data.title: Phillips 66 Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In a recent announcement made by Phillips 66, the board of directors declared a quarterly dividend payout of $1.27 per share on their common stock. This decision highlights the company's commitment to rewarding its shareholders.

data.title: Mustang Energy Corp. Announce Results from Sampling Program at Surprise Creek Project, Saskatchewan
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 17, 2026, Mustang Energy Corp announced the completion of geochemical analysis on rock samples from the Surprise Creek Uranium-Copper Project. The Project is situated in a mineral-rich area northwest of the Athabasca Basin known for its potential. Mustang signed an option agreement with Thunderbird Resources Ltd to acquire an 80% interest in the Project. Previous news releases on June 4, 2025, and June 16, 2025, filed under the Company’s SEDAR+ profile, provide more information on the Option Agreement. Mustang Energy Corp's stock symbols are CSE: MEC, OTC: MECPF, FRA: 92T.

data.title: Philip Morris International Announces U.S. FDA Reauthorization of IQOS as a Modified Risk Tobacco Product
data.description: Stamford, CT - The FDA has approved the renewal of modified risk tobacco product orders for PMI's two versions of the IQOS device and three variants of HEETS tobacco consumables. This renewal permits PMI to provide reduced-exposure information to adult Americans aged 21 and above who use traditional tobacco products like cigarettes. The FDA stated that PMI can continue marketing these products with modified risk labels for the specified audience.

data.title: Mississippi liquor shortage as state agency faces delays in distribution, causing stores to run dry after getting rid of conveyor belts in January.
data.description: The state liquor agency has been facing challenges in delivering products promptly to over 5000 restaurants, bars, and liquor stores ever since replacing their obsolete conveyor belts at the warehouse earlier this year.

data.title: Sazerac plans $15B cash bid for Brown-Forman, maker of Jack Daniel’s, amid industry struggles with falling alcohol demand.
data.description: A spirits company based in Kentucky has made an offer to acquire Brown-Forman amidst challenges faced by the industry due to a decrease in alcohol consumption.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Terradepth's Absolute Ocean Cleared Selection Process and Placed in NIWC Atlantic RCC Hopper
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Terradepth recently announced significant progress in its Absolute Ocean Cleared selection process. The company's placement in the NIWC Atlantic RCC Hopper is expected to facilitate direct prototype awards and expedite Navy adoption for unmanned undersea operations. This development comes after multiple revisions to the original release dated April 9, 2026. Terradepth, a venture-backed maritime technology firm, is paving the way for advancements in this sector and aiming to streamline the implementation of innovative solutions. This strategic move could potentially speed up processes and enhance efficiency, ultimately benefiting both the company and the Navy.

data.title: My Mountain Mover Expands into Dental with Virtual Assistants Built for Practice Operations
data.description: My Mountain Mover, a prominent provider of Medical Virtual Assistants in the US, has expanded into the dental sector from Orange, California. This move aims to cater to the distinctive needs of dental practices throughout the country. With the dental industry facing escalating staffing difficulties and administrative burdens, clinics seek cost-effective scalability solutions. MMM's new dental services address these challenges and offer efficient alternatives to in-house expansions.
Mannatech Reports Financial Results for Fourth Quarter and Year Ended 2025

data.title: Power Integrations Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Power Integrations (Nasdaq: POWI) granted 89 restricted stock units (RSUs) to a new employee who joined in April 2026, on the Grant Date of April 15, 2026. The RSUs were issued under Power Integrations’ Amended and Restated 2025 Inducement Award Plan. Vesting of the RSUs will occur incrementally, with one-fourth (1/4th) vesting on each of the first four anniversaries of the Grant Date.

data.title: Sazerac plans $15B bid for Brown-Forman, maker of Jack Daniels, amid industry decline in alcohol consumption.
data.description: A Kentucky-based spirits company has made an offer for Brown-Forman, a significant player in the industry. This bid comes amidst challenges faced by the sector, including a notable decrease in alcohol consumption. The potential acquisition highlights the shifting landscape for alcohol producers, with implications for both companies and the industry as a whole.

data.title: Itafos Announces Release Date for Q1 2026 Results and Business Update Webcast
data.description: Houston based company Itafos Inc. (TSX-V: IFOS) (OTCQX: ITFS) has announced that its Q1 2026 financial results will be disclosed after the market closes on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. A recorded webcast featuring management commentary on the financial results, business updates, and responses to common queries from analysts and investors will be accessible on Monday, May 4, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET. The webcast can be found on the Company’s website under the Presentations & Events section and will remain available for viewing for a period of 90 days.

data.title: Mannatech Reports Financial Results for Fourth Quarter and Year Ended 2025
data.description: Flower Mound, TX - On April 17, 2026, Mannatech, Incorporated (NASDAQ: MTEX) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluded in 2025. Mannatech, a worldwide health and wellness enterprise dedicated to enhancing lives for a brighter future, made this announcement.

data.title: DeFi lending sees $2.7B RWA composability as credit tokens soar. 10% of $27B tokenized RWAs used, credit assets 82% deposits.insi-fi capital flow.
data.description: Out of a total of $27 billion in tokenized Real World Assets (RWAs), only 10% are currently being utilized in decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms. However, credit assets now make up 82% of all deposits in these platforms. This data highlights the significant shift of capital towards credit assets within the DeFi space.

data.title: Rocket Doctor Amends 45 Degree Agreement
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, on April 17, 2026, Rocket Doctor AI Inc. disclosed plans to enhance their Google Advertising strategy. The company (CSE: AIDR, OTC: AIRDF, Frankfurt: 939) has signed an addendum to their agreement with 45 Degrees, Inc., extending services initially initiated on July 18, 2025. Pending regulatory approval, this move will see a specialized media campaign implemented by 45 Degrees to bolster the company's online advertising efforts.

data.title: CVB Financial Corp. Announces Completion of Merger with Heritage Commerce Corp
data.description: CVB Financial Corp. announced on April 17, 2026, the successful completion of mergers involving CVB Financial Corp. (Nasdaq: “CVBF”) and Heritage Commerce Corp (Nasdaq: “HTBK”), as well as their respective banking subsidiaries, Citizens Business Bank (“CBB”) and Heritage Bank of Commerce (“HBC”). The merger took place as per the terms of the Agreement and Plan of Reorganization and Merger signed on December 17, 2025. HTBK merged with CVBF, and HBC merged with CBB in an all-stock transaction.

data.title: Arbe Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
data.description: Israeli company Arbe Robotics Ltd., a prominent player in perception radar solutions listed on both NASDAQ and TASE, revealed receiving a letter from Nasdaq on April 13, 2026. The notification highlighted that the company fell short of Nasdaq's listing rules as the closing bid price of its Ordinary shares stayed below $1 per share for 30 consecutive business days. This development potentially jeopardizes Arbe's continued listing on Nasdaq.

data.title: LCI Industries Confirms Discussions Regarding Potential Merger of Equals with Patrick Industries, Inc.
data.description: ELKHART, Indiana - LCI Industries (NYSE: LCII) has officially stated that talks are underway with Patrick Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: PATK) for a potential merger of equal standing. The current discussions are in progress, with no guarantees yet on the outcome or the specific terms of any potential merger. LCI Industries has announced they will refrain from further comments unless there is a need for more disclosure. LCI Industries, a prominent company in the industry, plans to continue negotiations cautiously, considering all factors involved.
